feat: post-RC stabilization — charts opt-in primitives, demo docs & cleanup

## Charts — Opt-in Primitives & Axis Rendering Fix

Chart primitives (<Grid />, <XAxis />, <YAxis />, <ChartTooltip />,
<Legend />) are now fully opt-in: nothing is emitted to ECharts unless
the corresponding child component is explicitly declared inside the chart
root. Fixes a regression where nullifying axes broke cartesian chart
rendering entirely.

- BuildLegend() / BuildTooltip() return null when no child declared;
  JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNull cleanly drops the key from ECharts JSON
- BuildGrid() always emitted so ECharts respects chart Padding/ContainLabel
- BuildSplitLine() returns Show=false when <Grid /> is absent
- BuildAxis() gains top-level Show forwarded to EChartsAxis
- All cartesian roots (Bar, Line, Area, Scatter, Composed) updated;
  non-cartesian roots (Pie, Radar, RadialBar) gate Legend/Tooltip on null-check
- All demo chart pages cleaned up: removed all opt-out suppression tags
- ChartDefaults.cs: DefaultPadding centralised, replaces scattered inline values

## Demo — Project Structure & Docs Reconciliation

- NeoUI.Demo.Shared owns all static assets with StaticWebAssetBasePath="."
- All four hosting projects (Auto, Auto.Client, Server, Wasm) documented
- ARCHITECTURE.md, NOTICE, and all LLM context docs updated
- NOTICE rewritten: correct MIT / Apache-2.0 dual-provenance attribution

## Housekeeping

- Dependency package versions bumped for 3.0.0 release
- README updated to include new project template setup instructions
- Stale BlazorUI.* source fully removed (paths were renamed in phase 1)
